'''''Merasy''''' was a [[Nova-Drive]] [[3-Z light freighter]] that had a number of owners during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
Originally owned by the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] trader [[Iep Tumu]], he neglected the maintenance of the ship and attempted to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] cargo to [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal]] without customizing the ''Merasy'' with smuggling compartments. He was caught by the Brentaalan authorities, who impounded the ship.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Brentaalan mechanics had to debug, patch and set the ship before offering it in an auction; even then, they were unable to find the cause of the acceleration vibration that could be related with [[Acceleration compensator/Legends|inertial dampers]].<ref name="Stock Ships" />

[[Geld Bernar]], a [[Khil]] trader, bought the ship and made a profit for several years making long trips and getting valuable contacts every time. Bernar extensively modified the ''Merasy'' to adapt it to his needs: He bought good entertainment and increased consumable capacities for his long ships. He also purchased [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogation]] charts, some of them including secret not-for-the-public routes, that he logged in a backup computer.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

After several years, Bernar decided to sell the ''Merasy'' to invest in new ventures; he neglected to delete the backup charts.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

The new owner was Captain [[Vacasor]], a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] scout wanting to circumvent the known space. Vacasor replaced passenger space with more cargo decks, but again neglected maintenance. His co-pilot, [[Naneb Pefan]], was an experienced [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] merchant who insisted in replacing the [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] system, as Vacasor used [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]-infested routes in his activities. Nonetheless, Vacasor only managed to get a marginal profit from the ship.<ref name="Stock Ships" />
